### The Three Stillness Variants

1. **Serene & Organic** — Sage greens (#059669), Cormorant Garamond serif, cream background, soft rounded buttons
2. **Bold & Modern** — Dark mode (#0a0a0a), Space Grotesk, purple accent (#7c3aed), geometric shapes, stats-heavy
3. **Playful & Warm** — Sunny amber (#fef3c7), emoji accents, casual copy ("no woo-woo"), DM Sans

The skill is production-ready at `file 'Skills/frontend/SKILL.md'`.
